title: [TASK] Define foundational architecture for CV Creation Tool

conversation_log.summary: Task approved as a foundational architectural task. Correctly scoped — architecture.md is empty and must be populated before feature implementation. All proposed tech stack decisions are consistent with Epic #2. Constraints noted: i18n library TBD, contracts owned by packages/contracts/, migration naming must be timestamp-prefixed, all 4 ADR entries required in tech-decisions.md.

Task definition is architecturally sound and partially executed. architecture.md is fully populated. tech-decisions.md had 4 of 7 required ADRs. Three ADRs still needed: oRPC as RPC framework, PostgreSQL as database, TanStack Router + Query as frontend data layer.

Added ADR-005 (oRPC as RPC framework), ADR-006 (PostgreSQL as primary database), and ADR-007 (TanStack Router + Query as frontend data layer) to tech-decisions.md. All acceptance criteria are now met: architecture.md is fully populated, tech-decisions.md has all required ADR entries, and all feature tasks in Epic #2 can reference architecture.md for structural guidance.
